personal.name: Narahari Reddy Amireddy
personal.title: Frontend Developer / Full Stack Developer
personal.intro: I am a recent B.Tech graduate in Computer Science with a strong passion for software development, problem solving, and building real-world applications. I have hands-on experience in Java, Python, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and database management through academic projects and self-learning. I enjoy tackling logical challenges and continuously upgrading my skills through online certifications and personal projects.

about.summary: Software developer focused on building production-ready interfaces, scalable API integrations, and clear user experiences. Comfortable taking features from ambiguity through design, implementation, testing, and release.
about.careerGoals: Grow into a senior product-minded engineer who leads high-impact frontend and full stack systems while mentoring teams on quality, accessibility, and performance.
highlights: Built responsive web apps with modern React patterns
Integrated REST APIs and authentication flows
Improved page performance and accessibility scores
Collaborated with designers, backend engineers, and product teams

responsibilities: Develop reusable React components for customer-facing dashboards
Integrate REST APIs with resilient loading, error, and empty states
Collaborate with designers to ship accessible responsive interfaces
achievements: Reduced initial page load time by 32% through code splitting and asset optimization
Improved Lighthouse accessibility score from 82 to 97

responsibilities: Built internal tools with React, Node.js, and Express.js
Created API endpoints for task tracking and reporting workflows
Wrote maintainable documentation for onboarding and feature handoff
achievements: Automated weekly reporting tasks and saved the operations team 6 hours per week
Delivered a reusable form framework used across 5 internal modules

projects.name: Book Finder App
projects.description: A search experience for discovering books, saving favorites, and viewing rich metadata from a public books API.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A fast, responsive developer portfolio with theme switching, reusable sections, and GitHub Pages deployment.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: A productivity app for organizing tasks by status, priority, and due date with a clean board-style workflow.
